commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0c1ca7dd0304b0f597b4b3f1faf99f94cf1e8f3c)
commands.review_summary:
The branch wraps WhatsApp Web `sendMessage` and `sendPresenceUpdate` calls in a fixed 30-second Promise.race timeout and adds focused send API timer tests.

PR surface: Source +37, Tests +31. Total +68 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. live WhatsApp reproduction was established. Source inspection shows current main awaits `active.sendMessage` through `sendTrackedMessage` without an outer bound, so a never-settling socket send can keep the outbound path pending.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human/contributor follow-up is needed because the PR has a compatibility finding and lacks required real WhatsApp behavior proof; this should not be routed to automated repair while proof is absent.

target.title: Bound WhatsApp outbound send duration
target.body:
## Summary
- add a bounded timeout around WhatsApp Web socket send operations
- fail stalled provider sends with a clear timeout error instead of waiting indefinitely
- cover the timeout path with focused send API tests

## Tests
- pnpm exec vitest run extensions/whatsapp/src/inbound/send-api.test.ts
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/whatsapp/src/inbound/send-api.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/inbound/send-api.test.ts
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/whatsapp/src/inbound/send-api.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/inbound/send-api.test.ts
- pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.extensions.json
target.author: hussein1362

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
